p.span: in the System Design Life Cycle (SDLC)
Consider system's overarching goals, broken down into individual components
: Complete feasibility studies and requirements engineering
: Produce system requirements specification (SRS) for system architects and engineers
: Define architecture, interfaces, and data model for system using defined requirements
: Systematically translate business requirements into technical specifications for product
RESHADED approach offers flexible way to solve problems by combining common building blocks
